subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-01-29 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: The doors are closed on every side, and the way to salvation is barred, unless one is aided with spiritual power
subcodes.first_line_orig: از جمیع جهات ابواب مسدود است و راه نجات مقطوع مگر بقوهٴ معنویه و تأییدات غیبیه
subcodes.subjects: @development of capacity and readiness, @power of the Manifestation of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
